---
title: Gene regulatory networks in the developing human cerebellum
date: 2023-03-20
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.yml
  - ../_quarto.yml
---

## Goal of this analysis

The aim here is to infer the gene regulatory networks that are active in the cerebellar glutamatergic (RL-derived) cells. The regulon specificity score was calculated for each of the cell types in Hendrikse et al. 2022 (RL-VZ, RL-SVZ, GCP, GN, early UBC, late UBC).


## Files and directories

### Code

See `<pyscenic software directory>/aldinger_RL.ipynb` for the code and an explanation of each step. The CSV files from 2023-03-19 (counts and metadata) were used as input.

### Output

See `<pyscenic results directory>/20230320/` for the output files and figures. Briefly:

- `.adjacencies.csv`
- `.auc_mtx.csv`
- `.enr_motifs.csv`
- `.h5ad`
- `.qc_counts.csv`
- `.regulons.dat`
- `.rss.csv`


## Results
